segments.text: First, listen, and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why did Jenny want to leave the wedding reception?

translation.text: 珍妮为什么想离开婚宴？

segments.text: Jeremy Hampton has a large circle of friends and is very popular at parties.

translation.text: 杰里米·汉普顿朋友众多，在聚会上很受欢迎。

segments.text: Everybody admires him for his great sense of humor.

translation.text: 人人都钦佩他极富幽默感。

segments.text: Everybody, that is, except his six-year-old daughter, Jenny.

translation.text: 也就是说，除了他六岁的女儿珍妮以外，人人都钦佩他。

segments.text: Recently, one of Jeremy's closest friends asked him to make a speech at a wedding reception.

translation.text: 最近，杰里米的一位密友请他在婚宴上发表讲话。

segments.text: This is the sort of thing that Jeremy loves.

translation.text: 这正是杰里米喜欢做的事。

segments.text: He prepared the speech carefully and went to the wedding with Jenny.

translation.text: 他认真准备了讲稿，带着珍妮参加婚礼。

segments.text: He had included a large number of funny stories in the speech and, of course, it was a great success.

translation.text: 他在讲话中加入了许多有趣的故事，当然，讲话非常成功。

segments.text: As soon as he had finished, Jenny told him she wanted to go home.

translation.text: 他一讲完，珍妮便告诉他她想回家。

segments.text: Jeremy was a little disappointed by this, but he did as his daughter asked.

translation.text: 杰里米对此有点失望，但还是照女儿说的做了。

segments.text: On the way home, he asked Jenny if she had enjoyed the speech.

translation.text: 回家的路上，他问珍妮是否喜欢他的讲话。

segments.text: To his surprise, she said she hadn't.

translation.text: 令他吃惊的是，她说不喜欢。

segments.text: Jeremy asked her why this was so, and she told him that she did not like to see so many people laughing at him.

translation.text: 杰里米问她为什么，她告诉父亲，自己不喜欢看到那么多人嘲笑他。
